skipTests.name: BackendTLSPolicyConflictResolution
skipTests.reason: The v1.4.0 suite's own test manifest applies a BackendTLSPolicy at gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1alpha3, which the v1.4.0 standard-channel CRD declares with served: false. The object cannot be created, so the test fails before reaching any implementation. Upstream removed the stray v1alpha3 document in v1.4.1; the CRD itself is identical in both releases. Every other BackendTLSPolicy test passes.
